policy: Implementation reachability only. These probes confirm observable runtime paths and carry zero linguistic evidence weight. Historical batch-specific files were consolidated at v0.5.198.

cases.source: 好似我噉，我就鍾意跑步。

cases.scope_note: Exercises the bounded definition/explanatory wrapper only.
Exercises the internal non-licensing complement child inside DefinitionExplanatoryFrame.
Exercises the short 未 + V過 path only; it does not establish omitted-object licensing or equivalence with 冇 + V過.
Exercises the short 冇 + V過 path only; it does not justify the runtime's shared generic-negator wrapper.
Protects the final-未 question path without treating the parser node as an externally established construction analysis.
Protects the movement + 過 + goal child path only; it does not validate the surrounding negative analysis.
Exercises movement verb + action verb + 吓; it does not establish one unified motion-delimitative construction.
Exercises cognition predicate + 吓 in isolation; it does not establish complement omission or a cognition-specific node.
Exercises the runtime's NP-object wrapper only; external sources require complement-type distinctions and do not validate a generic object template.
Exercises the bounded subject + 整冧咗 + affected object frame only; it does not establish a productive causative-result construction.
Exercises the nested 整 + 冧 + 咗 + object wrapper only.
Exercises the bounded topic + 會 + 變成 + nominal complement path only.
Exercises the nested 變成 + nominal complement wrapper only.

cases.source: 佢會將呢間屋變成餐廳。
cases.scope_note: Exercises the bounded agent + 會將 + object + 變成 + result path only; disposal and modal scope remain unaudited linguistically.
Exercises the lexicalized 好多 + 都 + 熟咗 + particle wrapper only; it does not justify a general result-state template.
Exercises the bounded topic + 變咗做 + nominal result frame only.
Exercises the nested 變 + 咗 + 做 + nominal result wrapper only.
Exercises the exact location + 好似 + time + 停咗雨 frame only.
Exercises the nested 停 + 咗 + 雨 wrapper only; it does not establish a general object-result analysis.
Exercises the existing ordinal + classifier + overt head wrapper only. It does not generalize the interpretation of 第二 or establish productive ordinal syntax.
Exercises the nested possessor + classifier NP wrapper inside the bounded causative-result frame only. Standalone possessive-classifier coverage remains unresolved.

Protects the public compatibility alias exposed for the internal overt-head demonstrative-classifier NP. The alias is not a separately emitted internal construction and carries no independent linguistic claim.
Protects the current outer speech-transfer wrapper for the exact negative clause only; it does not establish that a special clause node is linguistically necessary.
Protects the nested exact 話 + recipient + 知 path only; it does not license unrestricted speech-verb, recipient, and cognition-predicate combinations.
Protects the exact subject + 諗住 + motion VP route only; intention, maintained-thought, assumption, and ordinary V住 readings remain unresolved.
Protects the exact possession + classifier-headed object + 要畀 recipient wrapper only; component evidence does not validate the combined clause ontology.
Protects the exact current subject + 叫做 + ASCII-name fallback only; it does not resolve the sourced personal 叫 versus definitional 叫做 split.
Protects the broad 記得 + visible VP-complement wrapper only; complement selection and broader VP-complement productivity remain unverified.
Protects the current bare action plus 都得 route only; it does not establish permission, free choice, or the optional-slot wrapper as one productive construction.
Protects the current 都 + 算 + price-domain heuristic only; checked evidence for 算 evaluation does not establish this exact wrapper or price-noun requirement.
Protects the exact negative 算 evaluation route only; attestation of the surface does not validate a broad ScalarEvaluation ontology or unrestricted scalar domains.
Protects the exact price-question route only; the attested surface does not prove that price, distance, duration, height, and other scalar questions share one construction.
Protects the current 覺得 + topic/object + 點樣 route only; checked sources favor ordinary cognition-plus-question composition rather than a special OpinionQuestion node.
Protects the current narrow 邊個 + 嚟 identity route only; independently attested identity questions with overt topics or copulas currently route differently.
Protects the current stance + scheduling action + time wh + 好 route only; checked scheduling evidence does not require 覺得 or a final quality predicate.
Protects the current 係時候 + action fallback only; checked temporal-clause sources do not establish this exact construction or its productivity.
Protects the current postposed 有 + nominal + 冇 route only; checked reference evidence establishes preverbal 有冇 but does not establish this postposed question frame.
Protects the current CompletionVP plus 就 sequence only; component evidence does not establish the dedicated wrapper, subject-sharing policy, or unrestricted completion-then productivity.
Protects the exact 返上嚟 route only; attestation of compound directionals does not validate arbitrary combinations, identical constituency, or the broad runtime label.
Protects the current degree 好 plus dictionary-backed lexicalized 好食 tokenization only; it does not establish a productive class or settle compositional versus lexical analysis.
Protects the current transparent 畀 relation while preserving passive and permissive ambiguity; the probe does not select one reading or establish unrestricted argument structures.
Protects the narrow 請 plus addressee plus 沿住 path plus predicate route only; it does not establish a broad polite-imperative construction or generalize beyond path commands.
Protects the current progressive predicate followed by a location question route only; it does not establish this word order as preferred or a special progressive-place construction.
Protects the exact seven-node progressive-plus-adjacent-VP wrapper only; adjacency does not independently establish purpose, event unity, or a fixed progressive-purpose template.
Protects the nested 洗緊菜 child inside the bounded parent only; independently supported V緊O structure does not require this dedicated internal child label.
Protects the nested 煮飯 child assigned by the parent only; V plus object form alone does not identify a purpose predicate or license an inferred purpose relation.

cases.source: 我哋與其食飯，不如飲茶。
cases.expected_surface: 我哋與其食飯，不如飲茶

cases.source: 與其埋怨自己生不逢時，倒不如增值自己。
我寧願留喺屋企，都唔想出去。
只要學呢啲嘢，就冇問題。
cases.expected_surface: 只要學呢啲嘢，就冇問題

cases.source: 只要份工高人工，我就做咩工都唔介意。
cases.expected_surface: 只要份工高人工，我就做咩工都唔介意

cases.source: 只要有得去玩，佢返唔返學都冇所謂。
只有同心協力，啲嘢先至做得好。
cases.expected_surface: 只有同心協力，啲嘢先至做得好

cases.source: 金融業只有喺多元化及繁榮嘅商業環境下，先可以興旺發展。
cases.expected_surface: 金融業只有喺多元化及繁榮嘅商業環境下，先可以興旺發展

cases.source: 我只有一本書，佢先有兩本。
我寧願去啲唔鍾意嘅公司度做嘢，都唔想渾渾噩噩噉又過多年。
cases.expected_surface: 我寧願去啲唔鍾意嘅公司度做嘢，都唔想渾渾噩噩噉又過多年

cases.source: 阿Tom寧願行十公里路，都唔肯俾錢買飛搭巴士。
cases.expected_surface: 阿Tom寧願行十公里路，都唔肯俾錢買飛搭巴士

cases.source: 有啲人寧願退黨，都要補上空缺。
既然其他國家都可以成功限制每日工作小時同埋實施最低工資，我相信喺香港都一定得。
cases.expected_surface: 既然其他國家都可以成功限制每日工作小時同埋實施最低工資，我相信喺香港都一定得

cases.source: 既然你都去圖書館，不如順便幫我還書啦。
cases.expected_surface: 既然你都去圖書館，不如順便幫我還書啦

cases.source: 既然佢唔得閒，噉我聽日再嚟過吖。
cases.expected_surface: 既然佢唔得閒，噉我聽日再嚟過吖

cases.source: 我既然答應咗，就一定會做。
